gleam 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Reference

All functions

assign_allocation_shares()

Assign Allocation shares to emission variables by commodity

calc_allocated_emissions()

Calculate Allocated Emissions

calc_allocation_shares()

Calculate Energy Allocation shares for livestock commodities

calc_avg_weights()

Calculate average and final live weights by cohort

calc_ch4_enteric()

Compute Daily Enteric Methane Emissions

calc_ch4_manure()

Calculate methane (CH₄) emissions from manure management systems

calc_ch4_ration_rice()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to methane (CH₄) emissions from rice cultivation

calc_co2_ration_crop_activities()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from on-field agricultural activities

calc_co2_ration_fertilizer()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from fertilizer manufacture

calc_co2_ration_luc_nopeat()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from land-use change (excluding peatland drainage)

calc_co2_ration_luc_peat()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from peatland drainage

calc_co2_ration_pesticides()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions from pesticide manufacture

calc_co2eq()

Convert CH₄ and N₂O emissions to CO₂-equivalents (CO₂eq) using GWP factors

calc_cohort_to_herd_aggregation()

Aggregate Cohort-Level Data to Herd-Level

calc_cohort_totals()

Calculate Totals by Cohort

calc_cohort_weights()

Calculate live weights by cohort and life stage

calc_conversion_factor_ym()

Compute Methane Conversion Factor (ym)

calc_daily_weight_gain()

Calculate daily weight gain by cohort

calc_fecundity_rates()

Compute Daily Fecundity Rates

calc_feed_digestibility_fraction()

Calculate feed digestibility fraction

calc_fibre_allocation_energy()

Fibre Energy Requirement for Allocation

calc_fibre_production()

Compute Fibre Production

calc_meat_allocation_energy()

Meat Energy Requirement for Allocation

calc_meat_production()

Compute Meat Production Outputs

calc_metabolic_energy_req_activity()

Calculate Energy for Activity

calc_metabolic_energy_req_fibre()

Calculate Energy for Fibre Production

calc_metabolic_energy_req_growth()

Calculate Energy for Growth

calc_metabolic_energy_req_lactation()

Calculate Energy for Lactation

calc_metabolic_energy_req_maintenance()

Calculate Energy for Maintenance

calc_metabolic_energy_req_pregnancy()

Calculate Energy for Pregnancy

calc_metabolic_energy_req_work()

Calculate Energy for Work

calc_milk_allocation_energy()

Milk Energy Requirement for Allocation

calc_milk_production()

Compute Milk Production Outputs

calc_n2o_manure_direct()

Calculate direct Nitrous Oxide (N₂O) emissions from manure management systems

calc_n2o_manure_leaching()

Calculate indirect Nitrous Oxide (N₂O) emissions from manure leaching and runoff

calc_n2o_manure_total()

Calculate total N₂O emissions from manure

calc_n2o_manure_volatilization()

Calculate indirect Nitrous Oxide (N₂O) emissions from manure volatilization

calc_n2o_ration_crop_residues()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to nitrous oxide (N₂O) emissions from crop residues decomposition

calc_n2o_ration_fertilizer()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to nitrous oxide (N₂O) emissions from fertilizer use

calc_n2o_ration_manure()

Calculate a ration component's contribution to nitrous oxide (N₂O) emissions from manure application and deposition

calc_nitrogen_excretion()

Compute Daily Nitrogen Excretion

calc_nitrogen_intake()

Compute Daily Nitrogen Intake

calc_nitrogen_retention()

Compute Daily Nitrogen Retention

calc_projected_population_size()

Project One Year of Steady-State Population Dynamics

calc_ration_ash()

Calculate diet ash contribution for a ration component

calc_ration_digestibility()

Calculate diet digestibility contribution for a ration component

calc_ration_gross_energy()

Calculate diet gross energy contribution for a ration component

calc_ration_intake()

Calculate Daily Dry Matter Intake

calc_ration_metabolizable_energy()

Calculate diet metabolizable energy contribution for a ration component

calc_ration_nitrogen_content()

Calculate diet nitrogen contribution for a ration component

calc_ration_urinary_energy_fraction()

Calculate urinary energy fraction contribution for a ration component

calc_reg_growth()

Calculate the Ratio of Net Energy Available for Growth in the Diet (REG – Net Energy for Growth / Digestible Energy)

calc_rem_maintenance()

Calculate Ratio of Net Energy available for Maintenance in the diet (REM - Net Energy for Maintenance / Digestible Energy)

calc_steady_state_structure()

Simulate Steady-State Population Structure

calc_summary_offtake()

Summarise Offtake and Stock Variation for a Steady-State Year

calc_total_metabolic_energy_req()

Calculate Total Energy Requirement

calc_transition_probabilities()

Compute Transition Probabilities for Sex-Age Classes

calc_volatile_solids()

Calculate Volatile Solids for Manure Emissions

calc_work_allocation_energy()

Work Energy Requirement for Allocation

run_aggregation_module()

Run Aggregation Pipeline: Final Herd-Level Results

run_allocation_module()

Run Allocation Shares

run_demographic_herd_module()

Run Herd Simulation

run_emissions_enteric_module()

Run Enteric Methane (CH₄) Direct Emissions

run_emissions_manure_module()

Run Direct Emissions From Manure

run_emissions_ration_module()

Calculate cohort-level average greenhouse gas (GHG) emission factors for feed rations

run_gleam()

Run Global Livestock Environmental Assessment Model (GLEAM) Pipeline

run_metabolic_energy_req_module()

Run Energy Requirements and Dry Matter Intake Calculation

run_nitrogen_balance_module()

Run Nitrogen Balance

run_production_module()

Run Production Cohort

run_ration_quality_module()

Calculate Feed Intake Metrics

run_weights_module()

Run weight calculations
